title: Connected sources
description: Runtime state of external platform connections. Lives in operator/connected-sources.json (workspace scope) or brands/{slug}/connected-sources.json (brand scope). Distinct from resources/conventions/{platform}.json which describes how a platform works generically.

brand_slug.description: Required if scope=brand. Null if scope=workspace.

sources.description: List of connected external platforms. Each entry references a convention by platform name.

platform.description: Platform identifier matching a convention file in resources/conventions/{platform}.json. Free string for unconventional platforms (custom convention scaffolded via connect-source skill).

account_id.description: Account or property identifier specific to this connection. Resolves to e.g. Meta ad_account_id, GA4 property_id, Shopify store_domain. Null if not applicable.

credentials_ref.description: Reference to credential storage. Format : 'credentials.env:{KEY_NAME}' or 'keychain:{service}:{key}'. Never store raw token here.

resolves_to_workspace_auth.description: True if this brand-level entry resolves authentication to a workspace-level entry (multi-tenant Meta BM, Klaviyo Partner, Shopify Partner). When true, credentials_ref points to operator/connected-sources.json entry.

last_error.description: Last error message if sync_status=error. Cleared on successful sync.

custom_fields.description: Extension point for non-templated platforms. Free-form key-value storage for platform-specific metadata not in canonical convention.
